title: selaginella marginata
intro: Selaginella marginata, also known as the "spike moss," is a species of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, arthritis, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella marginata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Selaginella marginata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
